title: T-033 — API: RBAC matrix wiring for planning permissions
prompt:
Wire planning RBAC permissions per PRD §3.2 (Permission surface) to every Server Action and route handler in 04-PLANNING. Permission set: planning.dashboard.view, planning.po.create, planning.po.approve, planning.po.cancel, planning.to.create, planning.to.ship, planning.to.receive, planning.wo.create, planning.wo.release, planning.wo.un_release, planning.wo.cancel, planning.reservation.override, planning.settings.edit, planning.sequencing.run, integration.d365.so_trigger.run.

Implement helper `assertPermission(action, ctx)` that reads JWT roles and the role→permission matrix from 02-SETTINGS §10, throws ForbiddenError otherwise. Wire into existing endpoints (T-008..T-031) via shared middleware/decorator.

RED test asserts each endpoint denies caller without the matching permission and allows with it.

pipeline_inputs.description: Centralized permission helper wired into all planning endpoints with role→permission matrix.
pipeline_inputs.details: Helper in `src/server/lib/rbac.ts`. Role→permission matrix consumed from 02-SETTINGS §10 helper. ForbiddenError type maps to HTTP 403. Wire via Next.js middleware for /api/planning/* routes plus explicit calls inside Server Actions.
acceptance_criteria: Given a caller without 'planning.po.create', when POST /api/planning/purchase-orders is called, then HTTP 403 with code 'FORBIDDEN' and no DB write occurred.
Given a caller with 'planning.po.create' and not 'planning.po.approve', when approve endpoint is called, then HTTP 403; when create is called, then 200/201.
Given each of the 15 listed permissions, when the matching endpoint is exercised by a caller missing that permission, then all yield 403.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/server/lib/__tests__/rbac.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED matrix test parametrized over 15 permissions + 15 endpoints.
risk_red_lines: Do not silently fall back to allow — default deny.
Do not hard-code role names — read from 02-SETTINGS matrix.
